description_long: This house features a barn-like structure with a gambrel roof covered in red shingles and three prominent dormer windows on the front. The exterior is clad in light-colored wooden planks, giving it a rustic yet residential appearance. The front facade includes two large garage doors on the ground level, a central support post, and a wooden staircase leading to a side entry on the upper floor. The rear side of the house has a simpler design with four rectangular windows and no visible doors. The roof is punctuated by skylights on one side, providing additional natural light to the upper floor. The overall design suggests a blend of functional utility and residential comfort, suitable for suburban or semi-rural urban settings.
description: A two-story, barn-style house with a red gambrel roof, dormer windows, and wooden siding, featuring garage doors and an exterior staircase.
description_view_0: Front view showing three dormer windows, two large garage doors, and a central support post beneath the overhanging roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the exterior wooden staircase leading to an upper entry door and a single ground-level door.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying four rectangular windows and a plain wall with no visible doors or architectural embellishments.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single window on the upper floor and a ground-level door, as well as the sloped roof with skylights.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with dormers on front and rectangular windows on rear
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry via exterior wooden staircase to upper door, with large garage doors and a central support post on the ground level
